title: Private AI Reading Assistant for Chrome | Skimlane
excerpt: Process pages as you browse with customizable reading recipes, local models, and no sign-up.
content_html:
Private AI reader for Chrome

AI-enhanced content needs AI-enhanced reading.

Skimlane automatically processes new pages as you browse and turns each one into the exact structured view you want—using ready-made recipes or recipes you create.

Auto Skim with rules and site exclusions Build, import, export, and share recipes Local-first storage with no tracking

Features

Your reading sidekick works beside you.

Skimlane stays active in the side panel while you browse: it processes each page, applies your chosen recipe, and keeps the result ready to question or save.

01 / AUTOMATIC

Always on. Still under your control.

Auto Skim runs on new pages with your default recipe and source. Turn it off anytime or exclude any website permanently.

02 / EXACT

See exactly what you care about.

Choose the sections, order, prompts, model, and level of detail around your interests, taste, and intended outcome.

03 / REUSABLE

Question it. Save the useful part.

Ask follow-up questions, reopen the page from History, and copy the complete reading artifact as portable Markdown.

Reading recipes

A customizable way to read anything.

Start with a ready-made recipe, change every section and prompt, or build one for your own purpose. Export the recipe file to share it; import it wherever you use Skimlane.

Worth Reading? What matters, what to skip, and whether the page deserves more time.

PM Brief User impact, product implications, risks, roadmap relevance, and open questions.

Signal Cleaner Unsupported claims, repeated fluff, generic AI signal, and the actual bottom line.

Recipe builder Customizable

Current recipe My Product Intelligence Brief ▾

Sections in this recipe

01Bottom linefast model

02User impactstandard

03Weak evidence and assumptionsthinking

04Roadmap implicationsstandard

05What I should ask nextcustom prompt

Recipe files include the structure and custom sections needed to recreate the workflow.

Private by design

No sign-up required.

Skimlane runs in your browser. Settings, recipes, API keys, history, saved skims, and chats stay in Chrome storage, with controls to clear or reset them. If you choose a hosted model, your browser sends the requested content directly to that provider.

Local-first by default No Skimlane account, backend, tracking, or cloud knowledge base sits between you and what you read.

Free and local options Use Chrome Gemini Nano on-device when available, a free local model through Ollama, or Groq's free cloud tier.

Your model, your key Connect a private or self-hosted OpenAI-compatible endpoint, or choose leading models from OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, and OpenRouter.

Delete what is stored Clear history, saved skims, snapshots, and chats; reset settings, recipes, prompts, and API keys from Data & Privacy.

Turn browsing into your own reading workflow.

Install Skimlane and let Auto Skim shape each page into the brief, note, or skim you need.

Get Chrome extension

content_html_zh:
Chrome 专用 AI 阅读器

人工智能增强的内容需要人工智能增强的阅读。

Skimlane 在您浏览时自动处理新页面，并将每个页面转换为您想要的精确结构化视图 - 使用现成的食谱或您创建的食谱。

具有规则和站点排除功能的自动浏览 构建、导入、导出和共享菜谱 本地优先存储，无需跟踪

特征

您的阅读助手在您身边工作。

当您浏览时，Skmlane 在侧面板中保持活动状态：它处理每个页面，应用您选择的配方，并随时准备查询或保存结果。

01 / AUTOMATIC

始终开启。 仍在你的掌控之中。

自动浏览在新页面上运行，并带有您的默认配方和来源。 随时将其关闭或永久排除任何网站。

02 / EXACT

准确了解您关心的内容。

根据您的兴趣、品味和预期结果选择部分、顺序、提示、模型和详细程度。

03 / REUSABLE

质疑它。 保留有用的部分。

提出后续问题，从历史记录中重新打开页面，并将完整的阅读工件复制为便携式 Markdown。

阅读食谱

一种可定制的阅读任何内容的方式。

从现成的食谱开始，更改每个部分和提示，或者根据自己的目的构建一个。 导出菜谱文件进行分享；无论您在何处使用 Skimlane，都将其导入。

值得一读吗？ 重要的事情、要跳过的内容以及该页面是否值得花更多时间。

PM 简介 用户影响、产品影响、风险、路线图相关性和悬而未决的问题。

信号清理器 不支持的声明、重复的绒毛、通用的人工智能信号和实际的底线。

配方生成器可定制

当前配方我的产品情报简介 ▾

本食谱中的部分

01底线快速模型

02用户影响标准

03薄弱的证据和假设思考

04路线图影响标准

05接下来我应该问什么自定义提示

配方文件包括重新创建工作流程所需的结构和自定义部分。

私人设计

无需注册。

Skimlane 在您的浏览器中运行。 设置、食谱、API 密钥、历史记录、保存的浏览和聊天内容均保留在 Chrome 存储中，并提供清除或重置它们的控件。 如果您选择托管模型，您的浏览器会将请求的内容直接发送到该提供商。

默认本地优先 在您和您所阅读的内容之间没有 Skimlane 帐户、后端、跟踪或云知识库。

免费和本地选项 在设备上使用 Chrome Gemini Nano（如果可用）、Ollama 的免费本地模型或 Groq 的免费云层。

您的模型，您的密钥 连接私有或自托管的 OpenAI 兼容端点，或选择 OpenAI、Anthropic、Gemini 和 OpenRouter 中的领先模型。

删除存储的内容清除历史记录、保存的浏览、快照和聊天记录；从数据和隐私重置设置、配方、提示和 API 密钥。

将浏览变成您自己的阅读流程。

安装 Skimlane 并让“自动浏览”将每个页面塑造成您需要的摘要、注释或浏览。

获取 Chrome 扩展程序
